summary: Convergence gate for derivation-heavy results: re-derive each atomic claim >=2 independent blind ways, reconcile by mathematical equivalence, iterate to convergence, emit a verification matrix.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available. Executor 1 needs the Claude Code Workflow tool; the cross-model CLI executor (Codex/Gemini/OpenCode) is a planned stub, so only claude_code is supported today.
